Moor by Maris Halna

Moor is a release by Maris Halna recorded and mixed in Berlin.

I worked on the project as producer, recording engineer, arranger, and mixing engineer. The focus was to keep the songs intimate and clear without overproducing them.

Roles

  • Production
  • Recording
  • Arrangement
  • Mixing
  • Release preparation

Release

  • Artist: Maris Halna
  • Title: Moor
  • Year: 2025
  • Format: 5 tracks / 19:16

Listen
